item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc 'for artifact in longhorizon-work/scenario-02/config/onboarding.json longhorizon-work/scenario-02/docs/onboarding.md; do
  diff -u --label "$artifact (before)" --label "$artifact (after)" <(sed '"'s/streaming/batch/g' \""'$artifact") "$artifact" || true
done'

item.aggregated_output:
--- longhorizon-work/scenario-02/config/onboarding.json (before)
+++ longhorizon-work/scenario-02/config/onboarding.json (after)
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "schema_version": 2,
-  "mode": "batch",
+  "mode": "streaming",
   "max_parallel": 3,
   "owner": "operations",
   "queues": ["new", "retry"]
--- longhorizon-work/scenario-02/docs/onboarding.md (before)
+++ longhorizon-work/scenario-02/docs/onboarding.md (after)
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # Onboarding
 
-Run batch onboarding for the operations owner with up to three jobs in parallel, processing the `new` queue before `retry`:
+Run streaming onboarding for the operations owner with up to three jobs in parallel, processing the `new` queue before `retry`:
 
 ```sh
-onboard run --config config/onboarding.json --mode batch --max-parallel 3 --owner operations --queue new --queue retry
+onboard run --config config/onboarding.json --mode streaming --max-parallel 3 --owner operations --queue new --queue retry
 ```
item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc 'for artifact in longhorizon-work/scenario-02/config/onboarding.json longhorizon-work/scenario-02/docs/onboarding.md; do
  diff -u --label "$artifact (before)" --label "$artifact (after)" <(sed '"'s/streaming/batch/g' \""'$artifact") "$artifact" || true
done'

item.text:
```diff
--- config/onboarding.json
+++ config/onboarding.json
@@
-  "mode": "batch",
+  "mode": "streaming",
```

```diff
--- docs/onboarding.md
+++ docs/onboarding.md
@@
-Run batch onboarding for the operations owner with up to three jobs in parallel, processing the `new` queue before `retry`:
+Run streaming onboarding for the operations owner with up to three jobs in parallel, processing the `new` queue before `retry`:
@@
-onboard run --config config/onboarding.json --mode batch --max-parallel 3 --owner operations --queue new --queue retry
+onboard run --config config/onboarding.json --mode streaming --max-parallel 3 --owner operations --queue new --queue retry
```
